models.candidate: The person being evaluated. Includes dual interview progress tracking.
models.jobRequisition: The open role with assigned interview team (recruiter + senior developer).
models.atsRecord: Structured candidate data imported from the ATS.
models.resumeDocument: Parsed PDF resume with extracted structured data. Uploaded by the recruiter.
models.linkedInProfile: LinkedIn data with work history, skills, and endorsements. Attached by the recruiter.
models.candidateProfile: AI-merged view combining all three sources into a single triangulated profile.
models.discrepancy: A detected conflict between data sources with severity and suggested interview question.

relationships: JobRequisition has one TeamAssignment (recruiter + senior developer)
Candidate has one ATSRecord, one ResumeDocument, and one LinkedInProfile
CandidateProfile is generated from all three data sources
Discrepancies are surfaced from the triangulation process

workHistory.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Led migration of core ledger service to event-sourced architecture
Reduced P99 latency from 480ms to 120ms across payment processing pipeline
Mentored 4 junior engineers through structured growth plans

workHistory.title: Software Engineer II
highlights: Built real-time fraud detection system processing 50K events/sec
Designed and implemented idempotency layer for payment intents API

parsedData.headline: Senior Backend Engineer | Distributed Systems | Plaid

candidateProfile.summary: Maria Chen is a senior backend engineer with 8 years of experience across fintech (Plaid, Stripe) and communications (Twilio). She specializes in distributed systems and high-throughput data pipelines, with demonstrated impact reducing P99 latency by 75% at Plaid. Strong Python and Go skills with production experience in event-driven architectures. Has mentored junior engineers and led cross-team technical initiatives.

discrepancies.summary: Title differs between resume (Senior Software Engineer) and LinkedIn (Senior Backend Engineer). Both indicate a senior IC role.
discrepancies.suggestedQuestion: Could you clarify your current title at Plaid? Your resume says Senior Software Engineer while LinkedIn shows Senior Backend Engineer.

discrepancies.summary: Terraform appears on resume but not on LinkedIn or ATS tags. Unclear depth of experience.
discrepancies.suggestedQuestion: How much hands-on Terraform experience do you have? Is it something you use regularly or more occasionally?
